update-fail: You have failure updated Agency expiration
update-error: The update has been stop for unknown reason
update-success: You have successfully updated Agency expiration
error-startdate-limit: \'End Date\' must be greater than \'Start Date\'.
error-enddate-limit: \'End Date\' must be a date in the future.
warning-active-expiry: This Agency trial period has expired. Please update a new trial period or remove trial period for changing this agency to non-expired agency.
warning-active-unactivation: This Agency was not activated the trial yet. Please update a new trial period or remove trial period for changing this agency to non-expired agency.
